战斗方面，单元片段写的都挺不错，但是一连起来就有问题，作者不喜欢铺垫，行文逻辑有断点，读起来就会不通顺或者看不懂作者想表达的意思（非审核章节），有种云里雾里让人摸不着头脑的感觉。
道具方面，作者目前拿道具写得太频繁了，有种流水账的感觉，说实话，这么多东西根本没必要，能写出让人耳目一新记忆深刻的道具或者技能才会让读者粘性更高（就比方说起点《诸界末日在线》里的“地剑”和各种技能，也不知道你们看过没有）。
总而言之，bug很多，但目前来看越写越好，尤其是日常，其实我觉得作者要写下本书可以专攻无敌流日常，成绩肯定比这本好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750591009,"group_id":"7396143055205567550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"文字内容等等，这个人很懒，什么都没有留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7PE23+piWwtT4gvDKF5s5QoxJB7tcUWjSXZb++74pxD","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/318369e38769493b8481caf1787aedda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530873&x-signature=FLdFnJW%2FbDdEGtVH1uSdkTLHS6g%3D","user_id":"3070253640714221","user_name":"似乎有点飘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3070253640714221","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7396143055205567550","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫+乐园+养成+多女主］
